title: Three Little Birds
why_this_song: Three Little Birds by Bob Marley (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 32 times; first heard in: "Don't worry about a thing"
Appears 28 times; first heard in: "Don't worry about a thing"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Don't worry about a thing"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "'Cause every little thing gonna be alright"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "'Cause every little thing gonna be alright"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: 'Cause every little thing gonna be alright
Singing, don't worry about a thing
'Cause every little thing gonna be alright
Rise up this morning, smile with the rising sun
'Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
Sayin', don't worry (don't worry) about a thing
'Cause every little thing gonna be alright

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "thing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "thing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "worry" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "worry" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Meanin', don't worry about a thing

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Three Little Birds" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Three Little Birds"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bob Marley one question about "Three Little Birds", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bob Marley sobre "Three Little Birds", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Three Little Birds" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Three Little Birds" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
